Metadata.Title: CVE-2025-58190 affecting package sriov-network-device-plugin for versions less than 3.7.0-5
Metadata.Description: CVE-2025-58190 affecting package sriov-network-device-plugin for versions less than 3.7.0-5. A patched version of the package is available.
